raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "motivational exhortation emphasizing agency through mindset over external conditions",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "personal thoughts, vision, and ideals are the primary determinants of life outcomes",
    "environment exerts no decisive constraint on those outcomes",
    "individuals possess sufficient control over their inner state to dictate rise or fall"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as inspirational rhetoric but rests on an unexamined dichotomy between 'environment' and 'thoughts'",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient treats it as encouragement to cultivate constructive attitudes while still addressing external constraints practically",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "recipient interprets it as literal causation, thereby discounting structural or environmental factors and attributing all outcomes solely to personal mentality"
}
